summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The hydrated artifact marks this as a mixed PR inventory shard with no shared canonical, no security-sensitive hydrated refs, merge/fix/raise_pr disabled, and low-signal/instant close disabled. Hydrated PRs are kept independently for maintainer review; refs missing from the preflight artifact are blocked as item-specific needs_human because live target_kind/updated_at were unavailable from the artifact.
